source: live mimo multi-turn session (real token accounting)
red_team_caveats: WARM session: turns were back-to-back with no gaps, so no 5-min TTL expiry occurred — this is the real analog of the BEST case, not the realistic-miss scenario. Gappy human-paced sessions still degrade per the modeled TTL sweep.
cache_write was 0 across all turns (server-side session persistence), so no 1.25x write premium was incurred in this measurement; other providers/setups may charge writes.
Single provider (mimo-v2.5-pro), single 4-turn session, small outputs — not a distribution over workloads.
Price multipliers are still documented constants; only the token counts + cache hit rate are now MEASURED (rung 4), which is the key upgrade over the modeled estimate.
